package.name: map_localization
package.description: Prior-map localization for the quadruped: GICP matching of FAST-LIO odometry output against an ENU-aligned PCD map, with RTK (bynav INSPVAX / NavSatFix) global initialization and fallback. Publishes the prior_map -> odom TF and transforms prior-map-frame waypoints into the odom frame for the CMU stack.
